title: sorghum × niloticum
intro: Sorghum × niloticum, also known as sorghum, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae and is a cross between Sorghum bicolor and Sorghum arundinaceum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of sorghum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for diabetes, heart disease, and other conditions. Sorghum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine and as a dietary supplement.
